title: Soul Land: Awakening World
description:
The first-ever 3D open-world MMORPG of the Soul Land saga is here!.Featuring dual-authorization from the original novels and anime—this time, redefine the Soul Land universe!

The moment of awakening has arrived. Welcome to Soul Land: Awakening World! From the instant the first spark of Soul Power stirs within you, your destiny is set: to stand at the heart of the storm and become the legend itself.

The old laws have crumbled, and a tide of new power is rising. From tranquil forests to hidden lakes, every unique Spirit and Spirimon awaits. Meet the legendary Seven Monsters and the formidable Spirit Temple Elders—their stories are yours to discover. Now, it is time to carve your name into your own divine epic.Redefine the Soul Land Universe!Beyond Boundaries: Explore the Breathtaking Realm of Soul Land

From the humble fields of Saint Village to the eternal frost of the Icebound Forest; from the untamed wilds of Aster Forest to the crashing tides of Isle of Poseidon—the world is yours to command. Every corner holds a secret. Scout for hidden treasures, delve into ancient caves to hunt Spirimon, or challenge the Spirimasters at Spirit Temple. In this boundless world, your journey has no limits!Shatter the Chains: Master the Art of Limitless Combat

Experience a faithful recreation of the original Soul Land combat system, featuring non-targeted mechanics, precise dodges, aerial maneuvers, and fluid skill execution. Seamlessly switch between Spirits, customize your tactical loadouts, and exploit attribute advantages to suppress your foes. Transform every encounter into a masterclass of skill and strategy. Experience the true rush of high-octane battle and the unique charm of Spirimaster duels!Hunt Unbound: Carve Your Legend as the Strongest Spirimaster

Warning! Spirimon spotted ahead! Prepare for an authentic hunting odyssey as you face off against formidable creatures in thrilling, high-stakes showdowns. Defeat these Spirimon to absorb Halos and Spiribones, unlocking a vast array of powers. Ascend to godhood with ease!Supreme Quality: Immerse Yourself in a Flawless Anime Recreation

Experience the definitive Soul Land journey, authentically adapted from the original novels and animation. With breathtaking, high-fidelity visuals and a narrative faithful to the source, your "Road to Douluo" begins now. Relive the most iconic memories of Tang San and Xiao Wu, grow alongside them, and uncover brand-new chapters on your path to divinity.

Join us now and embark on an epic Soul Land adventure fueled by passion and glory!
description_short: The first-ever 3D open-world MMORPG of the Soul Land saga is here! Featuring dual-authorization from the original novels and anime—this time, redefine the Soul Land universe!
